name: subcast
author: twoer
description: Offline, privacy-first audio/video transcription + translation desktop app. Local Whisper + llama.cpp, no cloud APIs.

scripts.release:check: pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm build:desktop:main
scripts.release:check:mac: pnpm release:check && pnpm build:desktop:mac && pnpm release:verify:mac-artifact
scripts.build:desktop:main: tsc -p tsconfig.desktop.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node scripts/rename-preload.mjs
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm fetch:silero-vad && pnpm fetch:diarize-models && pnpm fetch:whisper-cli && pnpm fetch:llama-server && pnpm fetch:yt-dlp && pnpm build:desktop:icons && pnpm build:desktop:assets && pnpm build:desktop:main && pnpm build:desktop:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:desktop:mac: pnpm fetch:silero-vad && pnpm fetch:diarize-models && pnpm fetch:whisper-cli darwin-arm64 && pnpm fetch:llama-server darwin-arm64 && pnpm fetch:yt-dlp darwin-arm64 && pnpm build:desktop:icons && pnpm build:desktop:assets && pnpm build:desktop:main && pnpm build:desktop:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.build:desktop:win: pnpm fetch:silero-vad && pnpm fetch:diarize-models && pnpm fetch:whisper-cli win32-x64 && pnpm fetch:llama-server win32-x64 && pnpm fetch:yt-dlp win32-x64 && pnpm build:desktop:icons && pnpm build:desktop:assets && pnpm build:desktop:main && pnpm build:desktop:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win
